web.title: AMD Expands Instinct MI350 Series for Enterprise AI Data Centers
web.description: AMD unveiled next-generation Instinct accelerators aimed at large-scale AI training and inference workloads in enterprise and cloud data centers.

web.title: AMD Q1 2025 Earnings: Data Center Revenue Surges on AI Demand
web.description: AMD reported strong data center growth driven by Instinct GPU adoption and EPYC CPU wins in cloud and enterprise accounts.

web.title: AMD and Microsoft Expand Azure AI Infrastructure Partnership
web.description: AMD and Microsoft announced expanded collaboration to deliver AI-optimized infrastructure on Azure using Instinct and EPYC platforms.

web.title: AMD Advances Open AI Software Stack with ROCm Updates
web.description: ROCm software updates improve model portability and performance for developers deploying AI workloads on AMD hardware.

web.title: Analysts Track AMD Share Gains in Server CPU and AI Accelerator Markets
web.description: Industry analysts note competitive momentum for AMD in data center CPUs and AI accelerators versus incumbent vendors.

news.title: AMD Stock Rises on Strong AI Data Center Outlook
news.description: Investors focus on AMD's Instinct roadmap and hyperscaler adoption as key drivers for near-term growth.
